remarks: Beautifully renovated in 2019, this exceptional 5-bedroom home offers a seamless open floor plan, generous living spaces, & the rare combination of privacy & convenience. Perched atop a knoll & set back from the street, the property enjoys a peaceful setting while remaining just minutes from downtown train, restaurants & shopping. Designed for both everyday living & effortless entertaining, the sun-drenched interior features spacious, beautifully proportioned rooms throughout. The chef's kitchen opens to the family room & flows through French doors to an inviting outdoor terrace, creating the perfect indoor/outdoor lifestyle. A formal DR w butler's pantry is ideal for hosting, while the elegant LR showcases a stunning marble fireplace. A charming sunroom provides a cozy retreat for relaxing/reading. The luxurious primary suite features a striking lacquered vaulted ceiling & spa-inspired bath w double vanities, soaking tub & shower. 4 Addl BRs are served by 3 beautifully renovated baths, while a private tucked-away office offers ideal work-from-home space. Set on a 1.69-acre property, the grounds have been thoughtfully reimagined by a landscape architect & include multiple terraces, fairy trails & secluded fire pit. Expansive sunny flat lawns provide ample room for play, pets, & outdoor enjoyment, all within a fenced setting rarely found so close to town. A truly special offering that combines modern updates, exceptional outdoor spaces & a coveted walk to town/train location
